leadText: The Toxic Orb (Japanese: どくどくだま Toxic Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It badly poisons the holder.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] At the end of the turn, the Toxic Orb badly poisons its holder. The Toxic Orb activates after the Pokémon would take damage from poison, so it does not take poison damage the turn it is poisoned by the Toxic Orb. The Toxic Orb activates after a Pokémon is cured of its status condition by affection , Hydration , or Shed Skin . It can poison a Poison-type or Steel-type holder if its Ability is Corrosion .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that badly poisons the holder in battle. X Y OR AS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that will badly poison the holder during battle. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a bizarre orb that will badly poison the holder during battle. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a bizarre orb that exudes toxins when touched and will badly poison the holder during battle.
